sqlMap.select: select FormDataKey, PolicyKey, PredecessorFirmName_1, PredecessorFirmName_2, PriorActsDate_1, PriorActsDate_2, PriorActsDate_3, IsPredecessorFormSelected, IsSpecifiedAttorneySelected, PersonOrEntity_1, PersonOrEntity_2, PersonOrEntity_3, DisputeRenderedOnBehalfOf, ClaimRenderedOnBehalfOf, IsSpecificProfServicesSelected, IsPreviouFirmFormSelected, PreviousAttorneyName_1, PreviousFirmName, IsSuitForFeesAction, PreviousAttorneyName_2, PreviousAttorneyName_3, LastUpdateUserID, LastUpdateTimeStamp, IsCoverageExtensionsChanges, IsSpecifiedAttorneyCareerEndorsement, IsTitleAgencyEndorsement, IsProfessionalServicesExclusionEndorsement from AdditionalFormDataLW where FormDataKey = #FormDataKey#
sqlMap.update:
update AdditionalFormDataLW set
PolicyKey = #PolicyKey# PolicyKey = null PredecessorFirmName_1 = #PredecessorFirmName_1# PredecessorFirmName_1 = null PredecessorFirmName_2 = #PredecessorFirmName_2# PredecessorFirmName_2 = null PriorActsDate_1 = #PriorActsDate_1# PriorActsDate_1 = null PriorActsDate_2 = #PriorActsDate_2# PriorActsDate_2 = null PriorActsDate_3 = #PriorActsDate_3# PriorActsDate_3 = null IsPredecessorFormSelected = #IsPredecessorFormSelected# IsPredecessorFormSelected = null IsSpecifiedAttorneySelected = #IsSpecifiedAttorneySelected# IsSpecifiedAttorneySelected = null PersonOrEntity_1 = #PersonOrEntity_1# PersonOrEntity_1 = null PersonOrEntity_2 = #PersonOrEntity_2# PersonOrEntity_2 = null PersonOrEntity_3 = #PersonOrEntity_3# PersonOrEntity_3 = null DisputeRenderedOnBehalfOf = #DisputeRenderedOnBehalfOf# DisputeRenderedOnBehalfOf = null ClaimRenderedOnBehalfOf = #ClaimRenderedOnBehalfOf# ClaimRenderedOnBehalfOf = null IsSpecificProfServicesSelected = #IsSpecificProfServicesSelected# IsSpecificProfServicesSelected = null IsPreviouFirmFormSelected = #IsPreviouFirmFormSelected# IsPreviouFirmFormSelected = null PreviousAttorneyName_1 = #PreviousAttorneyName_1# PreviousAttorneyName_1 = null PreviousFirmName = #PreviousFirmName# PreviousFirmName = null IsSuitForFeesAction = #IsSuitForFeesAction# IsSuitForFeesAction = null PreviousAttorneyName_2 = #PreviousAttorneyName_2# PreviousAttorneyName_2 = null PreviousAttorneyName_3 = #PreviousAttorneyName_3# PreviousAttorneyName_3 = null LastUpdateUserID = #LastUpdateUserID# LastUpdateUserID = null LastUpdateTimeStamp = #LastUpdateTimeStamp# LastUpdateTimeStamp = null IsCoverageExtensionsChanges = #IsCoverageExtensionsChanges# IsCoverageExtensionsChanges = null IsSpecifiedAttorneyCareerEndorsement = #IsSpecifiedAttorneyCareerEndorsement# IsSpecifiedAttorneyCareerEndorsement = null IsTitleAgencyEndorsement = #IsTitleAgencyEndorsement# IsTitleAgencyEndorsement = null IsProfessionalServicesExclusionEndorsement = #IsProfessionalServicesExclusionEndorsement# IsProfessionalServicesExclusionEndorsement = null
where FormDataKey = #FormDataKey#
sqlMap.select: select FormDataKey, PolicyKey, PredecessorFirmName_1, PredecessorFirmName_2, PriorActsDate_1, PriorActsDate_2, PriorActsDate_3, IsPredecessorFormSelected, IsSpecifiedAttorneySelected, PersonOrEntity_1, PersonOrEntity_2, PersonOrEntity_3, DisputeRenderedOnBehalfOf, ClaimRenderedOnBehalfOf, IsSpecificProfServicesSelected, IsPreviouFirmFormSelected, PreviousAttorneyName_1, PreviousFirmName, IsSuitForFeesAction, PreviousAttorneyName_2, PreviousAttorneyName_3, LastUpdateUserID, LastUpdateTimeStamp, IsCoverageExtensionsChanges, IsSpecifiedAttorneyCareerEndorsement, IsTitleAgencyEndorsement, IsProfessionalServicesExclusionEndorsement from AdditionalFormDataLW where FormDataKey = #FormDataKey#

select FormDataKey, PolicyKey, PredecessorFirmName_1, PredecessorFirmName_2, PriorActsDate_1, PriorActsDate_2, PriorActsDate_3, IsPredecessorFormSelected, IsSpecifiedAttorneySelected, PersonOrEntity_1, PersonOrEntity_2, PersonOrEntity_3, DisputeRenderedOnBehalfOf, ClaimRenderedOnBehalfOf, IsSpecificProfServicesSelected, IsPreviouFirmFormSelected, PreviousAttorneyName_1, PreviousFirmName, IsSuitForFeesAction, PreviousAttorneyName_2, PreviousAttorneyName_3, LastUpdateUserID, LastUpdateTimeStamp, IsCoverageExtensionsChanges, IsSpecifiedAttorneyCareerEndorsement, IsTitleAgencyEndorsement, IsProfessionalServicesExclusionEndorsement from AdditionalFormDataLW
